name: Conner Prairie Pumpkin Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onions and gently brown them in butter in a pan or kettle.
2. Add mashed pumpkin to the onions in the pan along with salt, sugar, nutmeg, and pepper.
3. Slowly add chicken broth and heat thoroughly without boiling.
4. To serve, pour into a tureen and add cream. Makes 4 to 6 small servings.
